main_description.name: main_description
main_description.default: 'Meet Evoq AI Assist, a context-aware AI that thinks across your entire suite, recommends what to do next, and executes work at scale.'

sub_description.name: sub_description
sub_description.default: 'Most tools give you data. EvoQ Assist gives you decisions. It reads what is happening across your CRM, service jobs, projects, and data, then tells you what needs attention, what can wait, and what it can handle for you.'

placeholder_text.name: placeholder_text
placeholder_text.default: 'Ask Evoq AI Assist about your business...'

description.name: description
